docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-06-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT INFORMED THE COURT THAT SHE HAS ALREADY PAID THE PLAINTIFF IN THE SUM OF $1428.71. PLAINTIFF MUST APPEAR AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE TO EXPLAIN STATUS OF THIS CASE. IF YOU DO NOT SHOW UP IN COURT ON JUL 06, 2015 YOUR CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE BY THE COURT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT HAS NOTIFIED THE COURT THAT SHE IS UNABLE TO REACH THE PLAINTIFF BY PHONE OR MAIL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY LE, NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT LUTZ, VIRGINIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-04-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES NONE LISTED SERVED MAR-04-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUTZ, VIRGINIA
DISMISSSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
